title: chrysanthemum myrianthum
intro: Chrysanthemum myrianthum, also known as the Korean chamomile, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum myrianthum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
